zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton於1065年出生在法國巴-諾門迪時，他的父親Lewis de Laval Lord of Seaton27歲，母親Baroness Emma de Gubion23歲。他於1088年與Anna d'Arsley在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德錫頓 德拉瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1096年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾波利布洛可 索可享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: DeLaval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of Delavant (and, in North America, an altered form of this), itself probably a variant of Delavaud, a habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Lavaud, the name of several places in the westcentral part of France. This form of the surname has apparently died out in France.
History: Cornelius Del Avant/Delavan of French descent married Deborah Green in Stamford, CT, in 1712.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton was born in 1065, in Lower Normandy, France, his father, Lewis de Laval Lord of Seaton, was 27 and his mother, Baroness Emma de Gubion, was 23. He married Anna d'Arsley in 1088, in Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1096, in Bolingbroke Soke, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton est né en 1065, à Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Lewis de Laval Lord of Seaton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Baroness Emma de Gubion, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anna d'Arsley en 1088, à Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1096, à Bolingbroke Soke, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton 1065 in Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lewis de Laval Lord of Seaton 27 und seine Mutter Baroness Emma de Gubion 23. Er hat 1088 in Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Anna d'Arsley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1096 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Bolingbroke Soke, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton è nato il nel 1065 nel Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Lewis de Laval Lord of Seaton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Emma de Gubion, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anna d'Arsley nel 1088, nel Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1096, nel Bolingbroke Soke, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert DeLaval Lord of Seatonが1065年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディで生まれた時，父Lewis de Laval Lord of Seatonは27歳，母Baroness Emma de Gubionは23歳であった。1088年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドセアトン デラヴァルでAnna d'Arsleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1096年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボリングブロク ソクで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton(이)가 1065년 프랑스 배세-노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lewis de Laval Lord of Seaton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Emma de Gubion(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1088년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 시턴 데라발에서 Anna d'Arsley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1096년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 볼링브로크 소크에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton родился в 1065 г. в местности бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Lewis de Laval Lord of Seaton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Emma de Gubion, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna d'Arsley в 1088 г. в местности ситон делаваль, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1096 г. в местности болингброк сок, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
